name: Bhakti Dhore
text:
When I spoke to Murtaza about designing my new home, I loved the first approach that he had towards designing a space. He only asked me one question, how do you want to feel in this house?'and asked me to leave the rest to him. The magic had started right there.
He is someone with a unique outlook. He aims at creating an appropriate vibe for you while making sure he isn't harming the environment. Such honest and organic designs. An extremely talented guy with 'out of the box ideas for every little thing.
Every single person who visits me for the first time here, has priceless expressions and utters the word
'wowwww. They say, it feels so warm & homely here :) 
Even my house help who literally visits everyday says '
with a smile every day :) 
Thank you Murtaza for putting your heart into designing this lovely space that I am going to call home forever :)

name: Zainab Lokhandwala
text:
It's a delight to work with Murtaza.He makes you feel super special as a client.His team is super fabulous and they have worked v sincerely (They ve pointed out problems tht would have gone unnoticed but made up inconveniences later and come up with suggestions and solutions) 
Aesthetic, Environment friendly and minimalist. Cant wait to have him do another of my project.

name: Dr Neel Bhatavadekar
text:
It has been a pleasure working with Murtuza.
He had great ideas about how to revamp the interiors, and worked extensely with me to give a custom outlook to my business space.
